text:

    audio/wavpack: Update to upstream release 5.5.0

    Details:
    - Use GitHub as main site and www.wavpack.com as fallback
    - Switch to CMake
    - Enable unit tests
    - Backport upstream PR https://github.com/dbry/WavPack/pull/125

    PR:             265155
    Reviewed by:    riggs
    MFH:            2022Q3
